role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on the 'FLOODWAY' text and script, correctly identifying it as English/Latin and analyzing its usage in road signage.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed the red soil, flat terrain, and scrubland, correctly linking these to the Australian Outback.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified 'Eucalyptus-type' trees and sclerophyll vegetation, staying within botanical expertise.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed the diamond-shaped sign and white delineator posts, correctly identifying them as Australian standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized the visual cues (posts, sign, vegetation) and used camera height/quality as a secondary cue.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Australia. All agents adhered to their domains, provided strong evidence (Floodway sign, Eucalyptus, red soil), and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Red soil and flat terrain are clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Delineator posts and sign shape are clearly visible.
